name: Saucy Beef Taco Pizza
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Taco Sauce, Mild or Hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and onion in a large frying pan or Dutch oven. Pour off drippings.
2. Add 1 cup taco sauce, green chilies, and olives to the beef mixture.
3. Separate crescent rolls into 8 triangles.
4. Press the triangles into a greased 9 to 10-inch pie pan to form the crust.
5. Sprinkle 1 cup crushed corn chips evenly over the dough.
6. Spread the beef mixture evenly over the chips, spreading with sour cream.
7. Cover with shredded Monterey Jack cheese and then shredded Cheddar Cheese.
8. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup crushed chips.
9. Garnish with sliced olives and mushrooms, if desired.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (375 degrees F.) for 20 to 25 minutes or until the crust is golden.
11. Cut into wedges and serve with lettuce, avocado, tomato, and remaining taco sauce.
